The '''50th''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from February 9 to 20, 2000.<ref name="Berlinale 2000">{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2000/01_jahresblatt_2000/01_Jahresblatt_2000.html|title=50th Berlin International Film Festival |access-date=2012-10-20 |work=berlinale.de}}</ref> The festival opened with ''[[The Million Dollar Hotel]]'' by [[Wim Wenders]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.nitrateonline.com/2000/fberlin2K-2.html |title=Magnolia Blooms in Berlin |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=nitrateonline.com | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20071110183850/http://www.nitrateonline.com/2000/fberlin2K-2.html| archive-date=10 November 2007 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.wsws.org/en/articles/2000/02/bff2-f26.html |title=The tension between cinematic vision and life itself |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=wsws.org |date=26 February 2000 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140825190445/http://www.wsws.org/en/articles/2000/02/bff2-f26.html| archive-date=25 August 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> ''[[Bossa Nova (film)|Bossa Nova]]'' by [[Bruno Barreto]], screened out of competition was the closing film of the festival.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://app1.chinadaily.com.cn/star/history/00-02-25/l01-berlin.html |title='Magnolia' blooms in Berlin |access-date=1 September 2014 |work=wsws.org |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070625162701/http://app1.chinadaily.com.cn/star/history/00-02-25/l01-berlin.html |archive-date=25 June 2007 |url-status=dead }}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Magnolia (film)|Magnolia]]'' directed by [[Paul Thomas Anderson]].<ref name="PRIZES" /> The retrospective titled ''Artificial People'' and dedicated to artificial beings and machines in the films was shown at the festival, screening films like ''[[The Golem: How He Came into the World]]'' and ''[[The Terminator]]''.<ref>{{cite web|url= https://www.berlinale.de/en/archive/jahresarchive/2000/02_programm_2000/02_programm_2000.html |title=Berlinale 2000 Programme |access-date=2020-02-06 |work=berlinale.de }}</ref> On its 50th anniversary the premieres of the films in competition at the festival moved from [[Zoo Palast]] to [[Theater am Potsdamer Platz]] located at [[Potsdamer Platz]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2012/film/news/berlinale-beginnings-1118049905/|title=Berlinale beginnings |date=8 February 2012 |access-date=28 August 2014}}</ref>

==Juries==
[[File:Gong Li Cannes 2011.jpg|thumb|252x252px|[[Gong Li]], Jury President]]
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2000/04_jury_2000/04_Jury_2000.html |title=JURIES 2000 |access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023083300/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2000/04_jury_2000/04_Jury_2000.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Gong Li]], Chinese actress - Jury President
* Lissy Bellaiche, Danish member of the [[Danish Film Institute|Det Danske Filminstitut]]
* Peter W. Jansen, German scholar and journalist
* [[Jean Pierre Lefebvre]], Canadian filmmaker
* [[Marisa Paredes]], Spanish actress
* Jean-Louis Piel, French producer
* [[Walter Salles]], Brazilian filmmaker and producer
* [[Maria Schrader]], German actress
* [[Andrzej Wajda]], Polish filmmaker

==Official Awards==
[[File:Paul Thomas Anderson 2007 crop.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Paul Thomas Anderson]], writer, director and producer of ''[[Magnolia (film)|Magnolia]]'']]

=== Main Competition ===
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2000/03_preistr_ger_2000/03_Preistraeger_2000.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2000|access-date=9 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015121139/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2000/03_preistr_ger_2000/03_Preistraeger_2000.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Magnolia (film)|Magnolia]]'' by [[Paul Thomas Anderson]]
* [[Silver Bear Jury Prize]]: ''[[The Million Dollar Hotel]]'' by [[Wim Wenders]]
* [[Jury Grand Prix|Silver Bear Special Jury Prize]]: ''[[The Road Home (1999 film)|The Road Home]]'' by [[Zhang Yimou]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Miloš Forman]] for ''[[Man on the Moon (film)|Man on the Moon]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Bibiana Beglau]] and [[Nadja Uhl]] for ''[[The Legend of Rita]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Denzel Washington]] for ''[[The Hurricane (1999 film)|The Hurricane]]''
* '''Silver Bear for an Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': The Cast of ''{{ill|Paradiso: Seven Days with Seven Women|de|Paradiso – Sieben Tage mit sieben Frauen}}''
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''Boy's Choir'' by [[Akira Ogata (film director)|Akira Ogata]]

=== [[Honorary Golden Bear]] ===
* [[Jeanne Moreau]]

=== Berlinale Camera ===
* [[Kon Ichikawa]]
* Wolfgang Jacobsen

== Independent Awards ==

=== Blue Angel Award ===
* ''[[The Legend of Rita]]'' by [[Volker Schlöndorff]]

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*''Of Woman and Magic'' by [[Claude Miller]]
